    ESCG AGM Agenda 2023

    AGM April 2023 (agenda) Agenda for the YCG AGM 2023 3rd April 2023, University of Sheffield Formalities Acceptance of Agenda Apologies for Absence Minutes from the AGM held on 11th April 2022 in Leeds. (Previous minutes can be found here: https://escg.crystallography.org.uk/agm-april-2022-minutes/ ) Any Matters Arising Reports Chair’s Report Secretary’s Report Change of title for Equality and Diversity Officer Amendments to YCG constitution including to Definition of a YCG member Equality and Diversity Officer Other changes related to the YCG name change New logo selection Elections to Committee Deputy Chair Secretary/Treasurer Equality and Diversity Officer BSG (Biological Structures Group) Representative 2 ordinary member positions Any other business Close
